untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'N consecutive periods with same-sign returns' and 'cumulative return over lookback period' thresholds, which need parameterized lookback windows and multi-period historical comparison logic not supported by single-bar indicator operators. The signal also requires confirmation_periods parameter and time-series momentum persistence that cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicator comparisons alone.
translation_notes: This is a time-series momentum strategy requiring rolling window analysis. The core concept (trade direction of recent returns) is captured by basic return sign conditions, but the confirmation logic (N consecutive same-sign periods, cumulative threshold validation, hold period management) requires custom multi-bar lookback functionality beyond the allowed indicator set. Recommend implementing as custom indicator or parameterized rolling return validator.
